// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace MainApp
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from MainApp.
    /// </summary>
    public static class MainAppServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMainApp(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.Service1Impl, global::MainApp.Service1Impl>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::SharedModule1.IService1, global::MainApp.Service1Impl>();
            services.AddScoped<global::MainApp.Service2Impl, global::MainApp.Service2Impl>();
            services.AddScoped<global::SharedModule2.IService2, global::MainApp.Service2Impl>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
